requiredImageRoles: Doctor D2 + raw reducer candidate image
requiredProofBeforeSmoke: image app JAR SHA-256 matches materialized D2R artifact
sample BOOT-INF/lib hashes match reducer manifest
old non-reduced D2 artifact does not shadow D2R
D2R CDS archive hash is recorded if CDS path is selected
runtime command points at expected artifact/archive
claimBoundary: Image rebuild plan only. No semantic, runtime, V2-C, V2-D, or memory claim is made.
